violations.description: Case file is 362 lines, above TEA maintainability guardrail, increasing cognitive load and review cost.
violations.suggestion: Split into focused modules by risk area (invalid correlation, duplicate suppression, providerEventId guard, replay retry).

violations.description: Same seed/bootstrap pattern repeats in multiple suites, creating copy-paste maintenance pressure.
violations.suggestion: Extract seed presets per risk profile to reduce repetitive setup argument blocks.

violations.description: Automate suite duplicates setup scaffolding with only label/id differences.
violations.suggestion: Use table-driven scenario builders to parameterize seed labels, neighbors, and payload mutations.

violations.description: Timeline extraction/filter snippet appears repeatedly across files.
violations.suggestion: Move timeline extraction to a small helper utility for readability.

recommendations: Split the 362-line guards/replay file into 2-3 focused modules
Introduce scenario preset helpers to cut repeated setup blocks
Factor repeated timeline extraction into helper function
summary: Maintainability is acceptable but needs improvement due to one oversized file and repeated setup patterns.
